title: Added `generateAuthContent` function
body: A new function `generateAuthContent` was added to handle the generation of minimal crawler-friendly content for auth routes. This ensures these routes are not empty when prerendered.
recommendation: No change needed; the function works as written.

title: Extended `SeoRoute` interface
body: The `SeoRoute` interface was extended to include `authKey` and `noindex` properties so auth routes can be described declaratively.
recommendation: Keep the new fields as they are.

title: Updated route iteration to use `PRERENDER_ROUTES`
body: The loop now iterates over `PRERENDER_ROUTES` instead of `PUBLIC_ROUTES`, so the prerender step also covers the auth routes.
recommendation: Leave the iteration source as PRERENDER_ROUTES.

title: Introduced `PRERENDER_ROUTES` constant
body: A new `PRERENDER_ROUTES` constant was introduced to combine the public and auth route lists into a single source.
recommendation: The constant reads clearly; nothing to change.

title: Created `auth-content.ts` module
body: A new module `auth-content.ts` was created to hold the crawler-friendly content helpers for the auth area.
recommendation: Keep the module as a dedicated home for these helpers.

title: Moved `buildSitemap` into `utils.ts`
body: The `buildSitemap` helper was moved into `utils.ts` alongside the other sitemap utilities.
recommendation: The new location groups related helpers together.

title: Renamed `fetchData` to `loadRouteData`
body: The `fetchData` helper was renamed to `loadRouteData` to match the surrounding naming.

title: Removed unused `legacyRoutes` import
body: The unused `legacyRoutes` import was removed now that the prerender step uses the combined route list.

title: Refactored `buildSitemap` for clarity
body: The `buildSitemap` body was refactored into smaller steps so the sitemap assembly reads top to bottom.
recommendation: The refactor is fine as written.

title: Updated `tsconfig` paths
body: The `tsconfig` path aliases were updated to point the `@seo` alias at the new module location.
recommendation: Leave the alias pointing at the new location.

title: Added `noindex` handling to prerender loop
body: The prerender loop now reads the `noindex` flag from each route and writes the matching meta tag.
recommendation: Keep the new branch as written.

title: Implemented crawler-friendly fallback content
body: Fallback content was implemented so crawler requests to auth routes receive a minimal but valid HTML document.
